message: No documentation action needed: The triggering push (a90714455f2ee926c2077ee2429e21b02ff203eb by @haiyuazhang) is a bug fix in the internal Azure Management Generator (eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt). It fixes tag method generation for non-singleton resources with bodyless PATCH and adds tests. No user-facing SDK packages were changed, no new public APIs were added, and no documentation gaps were identified.
